chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.S-79 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 28-04-2025 Petitioners are present in person Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement filed by respondent No.3/SHO Police Station Khenwari, is taken on record. It is the case of petitioners that petitioner No.1/Mst. Parveen Khatoon has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2/Soomar Khan and parents of the petitioner No.1 being annoyed of such marriage, are harassing the petitioners, therefore, they require some protection of law. Official respondent No.3/SHO Police Station Khenwari, in his statement, submitted that neither they have harassed the petitioners nor they intend to do so. SHO further submitted that the protection as required under the law, will be provided to the petitioners as well as relatives of the petitioner No.2. Learned AAG assured that the official respondents will act in accordance with law. Petitioners, being satisfied with the above statement of the SHO, do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with direction to official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, as and when they need. J U D G E Naveed Ali
